title: You can't miss it! — новые слова

items.example: Our tour guide told us the history of every building.
I always buy a souvenir magnet from every city I visit.
We spent the whole day sightseeing around Paris.
We went on a boat trip along the canals.
A guided tour of the castle takes about two hours.
The Eiffel Tower is the most famous landmark in Paris.
The cathedral is one of the oldest buildings in the city.
There's a beautiful fountain in the main square.
The local market sells fresh fruit and handmade crafts.
The city centre is a pedestrian zone — cars are not allowed.
Turn left at the second roundabout.
Go straight on until you reach the traffic lights, then turn right.
